mechanics.excerpt: Child Iabor is legal in most parts the Combine; if character cannot qualify for any other Stage Stage paths he can go to Stage and enter the worktorce , taking Civilian Job and ignoring the listed prerequisites_ DRACONIS COMBINE (HOUSE KURITAJ The first full-scale interstellar military operation was launched in 2303, and eventually Ied t0 the formation of the Draconis Combine in 2319_ Unlike other Inner Sphere nations_ which were formed through the union of already established alliances of planets_ the Draconis Combine owed its birth t0 one world and the indomitable will of one man: Shiro Kurita.
